title: Sacramento
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The New York Times recently named San Francisco the emptiest downtown in America with office buildings estimated at only 40% of their pre-pandemic occupancy.",
    "The number of people working from home has tripled since the pandemic according to the U.S. Census Bureau.",
    "California has the highest percentage of home-based workers in the country with roughly 35% of Bay Area residents working from home.",
    "Cities that don’t include housing in their downtowns experience significantly slower recovery from economic crises than downtowns that prioritize livability, according to a study conducted by UC Berkeley.",
    "Many of California’s downtowns were designed without housing and night-time uses.",
    "California’s demand for rental housing is sky high, with many cities reporting rental housing vacancy rates at just 2%.",
    "The lack of housing in California has driven up prices, increased homelessness, and caused millions of residents to be burdened with rents they can't afford.",
    "Office conversions remain difficult to execute due to hard costs of construction and extensive permitting barriers.",
    "AB 1532 provides incentives and removes local government barriers to office-to-housing conversions by enacting various statewide regulations.",
    "The California Downtown Recovery Catalyst Fund will provide grants on a square footage basis to projects that convert unused office space to housing."
  ]
}
```
